title: OOMKill Detected - Container Terminated
description: Container payment-api-7d8f9c was killed due toOutOfMemory (exit code 137). Memory limit: 512Mi, last reported usage: 471Mi (92%).

title: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
description: auth-service cannot acquire database connections. Pool exhausted: 200/200 active connections, 47 requests pending. Health check returning 503.

title: Upstream Connection Failures
description: 502 errors increasing on frontend-web. 3/3 retries exhausted connecting to payment-api upstream. Error rate: 8.2%.

title: Disk Space Critical - No Space Left
description: Disk usage at 98% on order-processor host prod-app-04 (/dev/sda1 49Gi/50Gi). Writes failing with ENOSPC. Queue depth: 15430 messages pending.

title: CrashLoopBackOff - Config Missing
description: inventory-service in CrashLoopBackOff state. Container has restarted 7 times. Error: ConfigMap 'inventory-config' not found in namespace 'production'.

title: Too Many Database Connections
description: db-primary has 210 active connections (max: 200). New connection attempts failing with FATAL: too many clients. Replication lag: 2.5s.
